meanings.definition: bits of sweet chocolate used as a topping on e.g. ice cream
a light shower that falls in some locations and not others nearby
the act of sprinkling or splashing water
examples: baptized with a sprinkling of holy water
a sparge of warm water over the malt
He scattered gun powder under the wagon

meanings.definition: cause (a liquid) to spatter about, especially with force
examples: She splashed the water around her
It has only sprinkled, but the roads are slick
